case_title: PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY VS. KIMBERLY MENESES ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-15-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-05-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-15-2019 CONTINUED TO FEB-26-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MENESES, KIMBERLY DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-24-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-24-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-01-2018

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-26-2019 CONTINUED TO JUN-04-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENESES, KIMBERLY $4,144.74 PRINCIPAL, $304.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,448.74, SEE SCANNED DOC
